title: 日本ダービーの後に・私の夢の次は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky wins the Japanese Derby, the second
Classic Triple Crown race. Her grandfather, who
came to the racecourse to show his support, is
over the moon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears stream down Special Week's face—she's
failed to accomplish her number one dream, yet
she stands ready to move forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her strength leaves an impression on Seiun Sky,
and we continue on our path to the Kikuka Sho,
the final Classic Triple Crown race.
